---
title: "ebic_score"
generated: true
description: "Extended Bayesian information criterion of a precision estimate."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.connectivity`](../nitrix-stats-connectivity.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ebic_score -->
```python
ebic_score(theta: Float[Array, 'p p'], S: Float[Array, 'p p'], n: int | Float[Array, ''], *, gamma: float = 0.5, edge_tol: float = 1e-08) -> Float[Array, '']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ebic_score -->
Extended Bayesian information criterion of a precision estimate.

Evaluates the extended BIC of Foygel and Drton (2010),

$$
\mathrm{EBIC}_\gamma = n\,(\operatorname{tr}(S \Theta)
- \log\det\Theta) + E \log n + 4 \gamma E \log p,
$$

where $E$ is the number of off-diagonal edges (upper-triangle entries
with $\lvert\theta\rvert >$ `edge_tol`, counted once).  The
Gaussian-graphical-model term
$-2\,\ell = n\,(\operatorname{tr}(S \Theta) - \log\det\Theta)$
uses the cuSOLVER-free rolled-Cholesky $\log\det$.  The parameter
$\gamma \in [0, 1]$ tunes the extra sparsity prior
($\gamma = 0$ recovers the plain BIC); select the path point with the
smallest score.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ebic_score -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `theta` | `Float` | `p` × `p` | — | Precision (inverse covariance) estimate to score. |
| `S` | `Float` | `p` × `p` | — | Sample covariance matrix that produced `theta`. |
| `n` | `int | Float[Array, '']` | — | — | Number of observations underlying `S`. |
| `gamma` | `float` | — | `0.5` | Extended-BIC sparsity-prior weight $\gamma \in [0, 1]$; `gamma = 0` recovers the plain BIC. Default `0.5`. |
| `edge_tol` | `float` | — | `1e-08` | Magnitude threshold above which an off-diagonal entry counts as an edge. Default `1e-8`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape —. The scalar extended-BIC score; lower is better.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:ebic_score -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
